citation.description: Tickets 4e19, 7c84, e7e0, fde0, 46f0, a3db all have status=closed with completion-verifier sshsig attestations (verified via show_ticket calls). Epic comment also enumerates all six with Gerrit change references.

build_payload emits schema=plan_review_result_v2 with all buckets (blocking+advisory+overflow+indeterminate+dropped), per-finding evidence/scenarios/block_threshold/blocking_enabled, and full coaching {move_id,move_name,subject,finding_refs,coaching}. code_review/sidecar.py lines 74-112 emits code_review_result_v2 with dropped+indeterminate buckets plus thresholds. Integration test at tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_workflow.py:368 drives real emit path and asserts on schema+fields. tests/unit/test_audit_code_review_v2.py and test_audit_coaching_fidelity.py cover code review and coaching.

criteria.criterion: After this epic, a freshly-run plan-review and code-review each write a *_v2 sidecar whose payload contains every pass-1 finding across all buckets with its pass-2 verification, its pass-3 validity/impact/priority/decision/reason, the resolved numeric block_threshold, and the pass-4 coaching. Oracle: an integration test runs a review and asserts on the emitted event JSON.

citation.description: build_payload branches on PASS to emit schema=completion_verifier_pass_v1 carrying criteria[]. SCHEMA_PASS constant at line 34. CompletionVerdict model in contracts.py (lines 119-147) declares criteria:list[Criterion]. Tests in tests/unit/test_audit_completion_v2.py assert round-trip and payload shape; tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py:597 asserts live PASS close persists the record.

criteria.criterion: A completion-verification PASS emits a per-criterion audit record. Oracle: a test asserting on the emitted completion event.

citation.description: audit_trail() aggregates plan_reviews (all_review_results), completion (latest_pass_record/latest_fail_verdict), and code_reviews (relates_to resolution). CLI at src/rebar/_cli/_audit_commands.py + help/audit.txt; MCP tool at src/rebar/_mcp_reads.py:121-132. Tests at tests/unit/test_audit_read.py cover aggregate shape, CLI subprocess, and MCP tool.

criteria.criterion: The audit read layer returns the full retained history for a ticket and its relates_to-linked code reviews. Oracle: an integration test seeding a ticket's histories and asserting the aggregate contains all of them.
